name: check-merge-ready
default_program:
[stages: preflight>detect>analyze>review>handoff>audit |
 scope: diff |
 policy: evidence,quality-gates{tests,security,compat,style},deterministic-output |
 lens: kahneman-tversky |
 output: md(contract=v1)]

required_inputs.name: KNOWN_TEST_SIGNAL
required_inputs.description: Executed tests, missing tests, or CI status.

required_inputs.name: CONSTRAINTS
required_inputs.description: Security-only, perf-only, compat-only, or other focused constraints.
